name: High-Protein Bites
description: Protein-rich traditional laddus made with authentic Kolhapuri ingredients. Packed with nuts, seeds, and natural sweeteners for a healthy and delicious snack.

name: Stone-Crushed Thecha
description: Fresh, hand-crushed thecha using traditional stone grinding method. Made with fiery green chilies, garlic, and aromatic spices for the perfect Kolhapuri kick.

name: Pure Cow Ghee
description: Premium quality pure ghee from grass-fed cows, prepared traditionally. Crystal clear, aromatic, and rich in flavor — the way real ghee should taste.

name: Dry Peanut Chutney
description: Crispy, savory peanut chutney with authentic Kolhapuri spices. Perfect accompaniment for any meal — sprinkle on rice, roti, or enjoy as a standalone snack.

name: Kolhapuri Achar
description: Traditional pickle made with the finest Kolhapuri ingredients and spices. Tangy, spicy, and full of authentic flavors that complement any Indian meal.
